title: SunSip
description: During my internship i worked on a webshop that sells beverages. I did both frontend and backend work.

title: Wordscapes
description: A simple art generator that creates abstract art based on your prompt without the use of AI. You can randomize prompts and even save your art to your computer.

title: Rently
description: Group project. A platform to rent everyday items. Browse through the items, register and book them for a specific date.

title: Dashboard
description: This is a dashboard you can freely customize by changing background, adding links,  writing down notes etc.

title: Quire
description: Group project. A notes application with qualities such as text formatting, image uploading and more.

title: Kanban Board
description: Group project. We built a kanban board with drag and drop functionality that is also customizable.
